# NeoBlocks - IDAHO GRANT FINDER - COMPLETE SLEEVE STRUCTURE

Extracted NeoBlock sections from the preserved sleeve source.

## N.01.01 - Grants.gov Search and Filtering
**TRG.GRANT.001 - Federal Grant Search Required** - Type: TRIGGER - Content: Activate when searching for federal grant opportunities. Keywords: "federal grants", "grants.gov", "usda grants", "epa grants", "federal funding", "government grants". Primary source for all federal opportunities. **DIR.GRANT.001 - Execute Comprehensive Federal Grant Search** - Type: DIRECTIVE - Content: GOAL: Identify all relevant federal grant opportunities for Idaho applicant. Success means: current opportunities found, eligibility verified, deadlines noted, application requirements clear. Prioritize: active opportunities first, Idaho-specific programs, realistic timeline for application.

## N.01.03 - USDA Rural Development Grants (Idaho Focus)
**TRG.GRANT.003 - USDA Rural Development Search** - Type: TRIGGER - Content: Activate for rural Idaho projects. Keywords: "usda", "rural development", "rural grants", "agriculture", "rural business", "rural community". Idaho is 95% rural - prime USDA territory. **DIR.GRANT.003 - Identify USDA Opportunities for Rural Idaho** - Type: DIRECTIVE - Content: GOAL: Find USDA Rural Development grants for Idaho rural communities (all but Boise metro). Success means: appropriate program identified, rural eligibility confirmed, state office contact provided. Prioritize: community facilities, business development, utility infrastructure.
